'''鈭歳-th-l''' ('''rathala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:echoise|echoise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:echoise|echoise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-th-l
|-
! Lemma
| rathala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rathalithi|rathalithi]] || [[word:rathaliji|rathaliji]] || [[word:rathalishi|rathalishi]] || [[word:rathali|rathali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rathaluthuth|rathaluthuth]] || [[word:rathalujuj|rathalujuj]] || [[word:rathalushush|rathalushush]] || [[word:rathal|rathal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rathaluthu|rathaluthu]] || [[word:rathaluju|rathaluju]] || [[word:rathalushu|rathalushu]] || [[word:rathalu|rathalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rathalufuth|rathalufuth]] || [[word:rathalufuj|rathalufuj]] || [[word:rathalufush|rathalufush]] || [[word:rathaluf|rathaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rathalethe|rathalethe]] || [[word:rathaleje|rathaleje]] || [[word:rathaleshe|rathaleshe]] || [[word:rathale|rathale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rathalothoth|rathalothoth]] || [[word:rathalojoj|rathalojoj]] || [[word:rathaloshosh|rathaloshosh]] || [[word:rathal|rathal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rathalotho|rathalotho]] || [[word:rathalojo|rathalojo]] || [[word:rathalosho|rathalosho]] || [[word:rathalo|rathalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rathalofoth|rathalofoth]] || [[word:rathalofoj|rathalofoj]] || [[word:rathalofosh|rathalofosh]] || [[word:rathalof|rathalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rathal忙th忙|rathal忙th忙]] || [[word:rathal忙j忙|rathal忙j忙]] || [[word:rathal忙sh忙|rathal忙sh忙]] || [[word:rathal忙|rathal忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rathalathath|rathalathath]] || [[word:rathalajaj|rathalajaj]] || [[word:rathalashash|rathalashash]] || [[word:rathal|rathal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rathalatha|rathalatha]] || [[word:rathalaja|rathalaja]] || [[word:rathalasha|rathalasha]] || [[word:rathala|rathala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rathalafath|rathalafath]] || [[word:rathalafaj|rathalafaj]] || [[word:rathalafash|rathalafash]] || [[word:rathalaf|rathalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:rathalasha|rathalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gorathalasha|gorathalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokirathalasha|gokirathalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:rathaln眉sha|rathaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gorathalnkn眉sha|gorathalnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokirathaln眉sha|gokirathaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rathalsh毛sha|rathalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorathalnksh毛sha|gorathalnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirathalsh毛sha|gokirathalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rathalrosha|rathalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorathalnkrosha|gorathalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirathalrosha|gokirathalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rathalmusha|rathalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gorathalnkmusha|gorathalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirathalmusha|gokirathalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:rathalsherasha|rathalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gorathalnksherasha|gorathalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokirathalsherasha|gokirathalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:rathalngasha|rathalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gorathalnkngasha|gorathalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokirathalngasha|gokirathalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rathalyasha|rathalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gorathalnkyasha|gorathalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokirathalyasha|gokirathalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:rathalyamasha|rathalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gorathalnkyamasha|gorathalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokirathalyamasha|gokirathalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:rathaln眉sh毛sha|rathaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorathalnkn眉sh毛sha|gorathalnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirathaln眉sh毛sha|gokirathaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rathaln眉rosha|rathaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorathalnkn眉rosha|gorathalnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirathaln眉rosha|gokirathaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rathaln眉musha|rathaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorathalnkn眉musha|gorathalnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirathaln眉musha|gokirathaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:rathalsh毛n眉sha|rathalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorathalnksh毛n眉sha|gorathalnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirathalsh毛n眉sha|gokirathalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rathalsh毛rosha|rathalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorathalnksh毛rosha|gorathalnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirathalsh毛rosha|gokirathalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rathalsh毛musha|rathalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorathalnksh毛musha|gorathalnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirathalsh毛musha|gokirathalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:rathalron眉sha|rathalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorathalnkron眉sha|gorathalnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirathalron眉sha|gokirathalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:rathalrosh毛sha|rathalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorathalnkrosh毛sha|gorathalnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirathalrosh毛sha|gokirathalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rathalromusha|rathalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorathalnkromusha|gorathalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirathalromusha|gokirathalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:rathalmun眉sha|rathalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorathalnkmun眉sha|gorathalnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirathalmun眉sha|gokirathalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:rathalmush毛sha|rathalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorathalnkmush毛sha|gorathalnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirathalmush毛sha|gokirathalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rathalmurosha|rathalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorathalnkmurosha|gorathalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirathalmurosha|gokirathalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:rathal|rathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:r忙th忙l|r忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horathal|horathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hor忙th忙l|hor忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorathal|hohorathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohor忙th忙l|hohor忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉rathal|n眉rathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉r忙th忙l|n眉r忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉rathal|n眉n眉rathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉r忙th忙l|n眉n眉r忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂rathal|n茂rathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂r忙th忙l|n茂r忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂rathal|n茂n茂rathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂r忙th忙l|n茂n茂r忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lurathal|lurathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lur忙th忙l|lur忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurathal|lulurathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulur忙th忙l|lulur忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lirathal|lirathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lir忙th忙l|lir忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirathal|lilirathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilir忙th忙l|lilir忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:korathal|korathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kor忙th忙l|kor忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorathal|kokorathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokor忙th忙l|kokor忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kerathal|kerathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ker忙th忙l|ker忙th忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerathal|kekerathal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keker忙th忙l|keker忙th忙l]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
